input:
Incident Post-Mortem — Production Outage April 2, 2026
Facilitator: SRE Lead Kira Volkov
Attendees: Leo Martinez, Ivan Petrov (DevOps), Backend lead Omar Al-Farsi

Timeline:
- 14:23 UTC: First alert — disk usage >90% on db-prod-01
- 14:31 UTC: Leo acknowledged incident, started diagnosis
- 14:58 UTC: Ivan cleared 40GB of WAL logs, disk dropped to 62%
- 15:05 UTC: Service restored
Total downtime: 42 minutes

Root cause: No automatic WAL archiving configured on db-prod-01.
Action items:
1. Configure WAL archiving — Owner: Ivan, Deadline: April 12, 2026
2. Disk alert threshold lowered from 90% to 75% — Owner: Kira, Deadline: April 9, 2026
3. Runbook updated — Owner: Leo, Deadline: April 14, 2026
